runtime_impact: Layout correction. The IntelligenceField is now a three-column grid where the center column carries the primary semantic operational cognition surface, the left column hosts a compressed executive interpretation companion, and the right column hosts a calm support rail (evidence state + qualifier + Report Pack). The horizontal Report Pack band is removed; Report Pack now lives inside the SupportRail. The duplicated compact evidence-state at the bottom of each rep field is removed (canonical evidence state lives in the SupportRail). Mode-specific canvas designs were rescaled for the wider center column. No behavior change to render-state vocabulary, qualifier semantics, propagation logic, governance pass/fail, or evidence-block content. No new dependencies. No new API endpoints. Route compiles and renders cleanly at HTTP 200 across all four lenses.
notes: Single source-file change. Adds: ExecutiveInterpretation, SupportRail components. Restructures IntelligenceField into 3-column. Removes ReportPackBand horizontal band. Removes duplicated RepEvidenceState calls. Rescales BalancedConsequenceField anchors (horizontal flow with pressure-graded rail), DenseTopologyField (spatial 3-column with central PASS-THROUGH actor and gradient rail), BoardroomAtmosphericField (320×320 mark area, 168px ring with outer halo). Removes orphan .report-pack horizontal-band CSS (replaced with SupportRail report-pack CSS). 8 Playwright screenshots produced as visual evidence.
